title: Translations. - Psyches Mourning. (From Von Salis-Seewis.)
meaning:
George MacDonald's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Translations. - Psyches Mourning. (From Von Salis-Seewis.)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
